summary: POST /comfy/extra-folders writes extra_model_paths.yaml but never reloads the running ComfyUI's paths. New folder invisible to /prompt validation -> 400 'Value not in list: lora_name'. App's own lora scan is fresh (dropdown OK) while gen fails. Fix = runtime PATH RELOAD (load_extra_path_config + cache_helper invalidate, exposed as a route — no Manager/reload route in core), NOT a full restart. Check remote/Pod twin too. Surfaced by MPI-217 Chroma LoRA test; not Chroma-specific. Full detail in brief.md. Handoff to separate session.

note: root cause corrected: injector regex, not reload
all 3 bugs live-verified; MpiNodes v1.1.4 shipped
